actions: Stark: So there it is, I have to bring out the big game... I don't know if 40m is possible but my blinded senses active I notice an approaching air current! Hand in my pouch and with a wrist I throw leaflets in front while making a 10m jump backward. A chain explosion occurs to dilate the air pressure... At the first explosion I activate my Raiton Armor... The blast of the explosions and the dilating air are enough to push us both back.

Aymar: Moustapha blind... The almighty amazes me 😆... Well being blind he sees nothing so impossible for him to locate me 🌝! You feel the air current it seems 😆? Let's see how you're going to get out of something that makes no noise.... I put away my kunai and quickly compose 2 series of mudra I launch Futon Great Breakthrough Technique which blows away the smoke created by the explosion leaving Stark blind exposed... He'll just feel a vast air current approaching him then suddenly feel pierced from all sides let the carnage begin 😆💥... It also seems that the temperature is starting to rise here 🌝.. AC posed. Futon Great Breakthrough Technique. Next
Stark: 🌚ah… you forgot my glasses

Stark: I had put on my glasses so now I regain my sight little by little enough to perceive his movements from afar… Who knows… the chain explosions have turned off our hearing for a moment 🌚… Let's say the tumults have made us now 50m apart. My Raiton armor active, I pack up my Shuriken chain and my Kunai in my pouch and keep them intact,... I perceive everything you do… You the only blind one see nothing… I take out my Kiba imbued with Raiton chakra that I hold it's time for a 8m/s run towards my opponent. The good things begin!!!

Aymar: It seems this one forgot the air current rushing towards him !!! AC revealed. A salvo of 40 air bullets is launched towards Stark before he gradually recovers his sight and there you go an smoke screen rises on the terrain there 2 Aymar come out 1 from the left and the other from the right of the smoke and see on the back of one of them an orb of Heat the temperature rises..... Shakuton Death by Steaming. AC maintained. Nectar. Futon Sphere of Vacuum x4

Stark: And well… with my glasses I perceive from afar where his mudra were. My kiba in hand,... I invoked a powerful lightning, my armor still active I whirl on myself so powerfully creating a powerful ascending air whirlwind coupled with natural Lightning at its end a huge dragon that snakes towards him… its whirling trunk sucks the air balls with its powerful rotation sense increasing its speed… The dragon heads towards you razing everything in its path with open mouth… Action in progress. Lightning Dragon Tornado - Assimilation
Aymar: Which one are you aiming for? The left one or the right one?
Stark: I spare none. Aim for the amplitude of a tornado

Aymar: It seems our little game is coming to an end🌝... AC revealed. Since the launch of the blinding bomb I created 4 heat spheres of which I sent 3 on Stark these had taken altitude to escape his eyes and descend taking Stark by surprise touching him 🚼and dehydrating him. Hence his call to lightning and his tornado will never see the light of day.... Shakuton Death by Steaming. Next
Stark: Champions !!! Esseu you take into account the distance 🧎🏽…
Aymar: Yes I take it into account that's why I just now say that your touched the spheres were present since the beginning of the combat
♨️ COMBAT libre 1vs1 SNG ♨️. ♨️ FIN DU COMBAT ♨️
STARK: A double of me ? Never. I take out my kibas and rush towards him prudently but quickly.

Stark: They say there's nothing worse than fighting against oneself… Quickly I take out my kiba… that I plant in the ground in front of me… I compose a mudra there's lightning on hands once mudra broken… I'm on the lookout…

STARK: that proves he's also ready to, slowly but surely, before entering 15m from my opponent, I pose, plant my kibas in the ground, follows a thunder chain towards the other there until calcining him. On that, I wear a pair of glasses, quietly I take back my weapons and prepare to advance. # thunder rain 😂

Stark: And well… I place my hands on the ground. It's without latency my adv penetrating less than 20m of my perimeter several lightnings spread on the ground on the whole terrain around me in spider web shape electrocuting him continuously and preventing him from performing his actions and moving… On my guard action in progress… I don't take my eyes off my double… #Raiton - Spider Web

STARK: WTF nothing proves that your actions will be faster than mine. Stark not having countered my attacks, the lightning continues until electrocuting his cerebellum. On my side, while the lightning rushes towards my opponent he takes advantage of this lapse of time to do a technique that I know well. After my attack, Stark attacks me, his technique activates, rushes and touches me. Bizarre silent after the contact of the technique, dust rises around me because of the intensity of the impact. 1 second is enough for all this suspense to be removed, me finding myself at 14m from stark with my kibas, my glasses and an unbeatable lightning armor of lightning. at 14m from Stark proves how much his technique could do nothing. At 14m, with a 10m movement. With another movement, face to face with the Stark calcined by my lightning, instantaneously I find myself in front of Stark, before he even says his last words after burn by lightning. He gets his throat slit dry by raitonized kibas genre 😭 quick death. # lightning armor # instantaneous displacement (10 m )....

Stark: It was quite clear that my actions are performed before he does his so I think he had nothing to do and the timing disposes that he is in full electrocution And ends up in the vapes..😹 Boff he says activate his armor, facing this riposte I activate my armor also and I break my technique by removing my swords from the ground… which levitate behind my back Let's go ! His limbs numb I don't think he can move I do a 10m displacement instantaneously then take a speed of 8m per second I come out in his back… Action in progress… he hears that I inhale deeply…
♨️ COMBAT libre 1vs1 SNG ♨️. ♨️ Fin DU COMBAT ♨️

Yusuke: A combat facing an opponent standing at 25m from my position in the Suna desert.... The combat started from my side I take out an oval object that I launch towards Hadès following this action a light is seen around Hades and he sees himself blinded behind this light Ac. Then just the instant after Hadès starts to be sucked into the ground and feels something exploding on his chest all this being blinded..... To you
Arbitre: _Pursue…_

Hadès Yami: _Finally.....🥲 it had been a heck of a while since I hadn't set foot in an arena and the very day it happens it's an otsutsuki I have to face misery☹️...anyway in front of me I have an opponent whose power and strength is totally unknown to me._ _25m between us that I could see yusuke take out this oval object which was not invisible to my eyes that the very second that follows after its exit yusuke could see coming on him 4kunais parchment with explosives rushed on him aligned from right to left._ _(the launch of the oval object is launched at the same time as my kunais ) which therefore leaves me the time before this object can reach my position the explosive kunai closest to this object is suddenly exploded by the mudra of the katsu technique seized by me. The blinding bomb explodes at 15m from me which is far from blinding me given the distance._ _That makes your future actions no longer unknown to me senso activated a 10m jump to the left side is executed during the explosion of the bomb at 15m from me executing mudras when suddenly a fireball making 5m in diameter rushes at high speed on you and aims to calcine you._ _Katon - Supreme Fireball_➰

Arbitre: MC of Hades. According to the chronology the ball is launched simultaneously with the explosions… these create a thick smoke screen that separates Yusuke and Hades… Hades who hasn't moved is sucked into the ground… The suite depends on you. _Continue…_
Arbitre: The fireball heads to Yusuke's position who is no longer on the ground… A series of explosions is triggered at Hades' old position
Arbitre: I think

Yusuke: From my position in the air Hadès will detect me of course if he is senso .... I observe how Hadès sinks into the ground but well as a precaution I summon shiryu to assist me .... Shiryu summon his last at a height of 20m me above him shiryu blows a flame marsh that descends above hades' head a width of 20m then he sends him a salvo of 1m spikes Going at 10m/sec just after the flame launch which goes at 8m/sec .... #summon shiryu : fire breath + spikes.... # Byakuringan active .... To you

Hadès Yami: It's becoming really interesting all this but can I get out alive?....anyway the suite depends on my reaction... Little by little I start to enter this ground when suddenly my pupils go to level two which is the oningan and a heat giant which is a heat entity resistant with improved biju strength and resistance. This thermal giant by surrounding me clears the earth around me and makes me rise in elevation little by little. The Thermal Giant can easily resist this flame marsh knowing that it's heat itself. By activating this a thermal cover covers me everywhere. Giant active flame marsh cashed being out of the smoke placed at the inter of the giant's head knowing that it makes a fairly large size the smoke is not enough to cover it and knowing yusuke's position seen my active senso an intense heat of 500° rushes on him and very quickly up to 70m distance everything is calcined by this heat that the thermal giant gives off, the trees , the earth starts to heat , the air makes hot gas palpitate everything becomes burning. Netsu Hogo no kami➰ Heat of 500°➰
Arbitre: Hum… I have to deal with monsters ! You will hurt if you destroy the Suna desert… Pursue !
💢➖✖️➖💢: Ahh we are in an arena The Sanctions fall only …

Yusuke: Well above my dragon I see how the thermal giant is created parallel to its creation I take altitude up to Going to more than 150m height very quickly dragon displacement speed I don't know between 20m/sec and 15m/sec see 25m/sec .... Above my dragon always given the distance the adverse attacks will not reach me so from my position I wait well Wisely that he finishes his chakra 🚼 I remain in constant movement above his person turning around him like a vulture waiting for the right moment .... Mudras in execution To you
Hadès Yami: In the thermal giant I deactivate the heat and scrutinize the surroundings '.... Fin

Yusuke: Well there you go my opponent has calmed down I move so as to be at 40m above his head my mudras performed there you go a rain starts to rain above his head and that of his colossus... #Suiton - Sharp Shower To you
Hadès Yami: Hum there you are moving barely arrived at 40m you could see the colossus perform a 30m jump on the left side to get out of the range of your rain.. Fin
Arbitre: Even I have become a spectator _```Pursue ooh….```_

Yusuke: My opponent tries as best he can to flee but unfortunately he remains in my rain .... Me always above his head I follow him but my dragon launches him 20 1m spikes Going at 10m/sec then he disappears .... I use doton heavy and light body to fly in the air.... # Suiton - Sharp Shower maintained # doton - heavy and light body # spikes towards the part of his head where the water descends his chakra goes away quickly To you
Arbitre: Hades Static loses by latency…
♨️ COMBAT 1vs1 SNG ♨️. ♨️ FIN DU COMBAT ♨️
Arbitre: Hajime !!!
Arbitre >>>>Chic: _R. A. S._

Hadès Yami: Well well there you go the combat starts 25m separates us I am facing the young aymar , I think the combat was launched.... 25m separates us there he starts the hostilities right his mudra composition chained I seize a mudra that of the horse , when a fire wave was blown towards him barely the composition of his mudras finished the fire wave was already at 17m from him he performs his jump the wave is at 9m from him , when he released his two first blades he finds himself calcined by the fire wave which is 10m long and 20m wide swallowing his two deflagrations barely out of him and calcines very well. in case his deflagrations could pass my wave three 10m jumps to the left are performed by me. Katon-Embrassment supreme
Arbitre: Claim what
Arbitre: Hades, Aymar's first attack was followed directly by the second… And in the norms of his hasty recoil… Pursue…

Hadès Yami: Hum there you go the attack that I launched makes a U-turn and looks more powerful than just now. I perform again the horse mudra and send another embrassment towards the one rushing on me. Knowing that its power is decupled I will therefore also decuple mine by activating my Oganingan and a heat of 500° is added to this wave making its flames more intense and more calcining I imagine therefore that the two attacks cancel each other barely aymar propels himself into the air a succession of mudras was executed by me knowing that the two attacks entered in collision which means that a smoke was created, active sensoriality aymar's position detected an Intense fire breath was out of my mouth up to aymar's position and surrounds him in a massive Torrent of flames that can engulf the susano. Katon-Embrassment supreme katon supreme pyre
arbitre: ⛔ Sanction ⛔ -3M$2 on Hades Yami's account Know that here it's an arena To the attention of @⁨~marckemael⁩
Arbitre: Hades, did you perform a flame technique on his Futon ?

Arbitre: Sweet jesus… a oven that ends up roasted. Aymar's attack has the particularity to easily link to katon and the time to redo a second katon you end up propelled and grilled. Without noting that you haven't moved. Victory of Aymar
Arbitre: Stop the useless messages.

Arbitre: Stop the useless messages. @⁨Hades⁩ Aymar's Futon attacks are compressed air techniques to cite void deflagration and Gedsuga tenshō (which has secondary utility to mix easily with fire) your Katon attacks have heated them by passing through and you who haven't moved you end up hit.
♨️ COMBAT SINGULIER SNG ♨️. ♨️ FIN DU COMBAT ♨️

I activate my thermal cover which will prevent me from being reached by the heat. Oganingan active➰

combats.id: TOURNOI SNG BIRTHDAY - Uchiha Yuki vs Uchiha Akihiro
actions: Arbitre: Yuki static Next

Uchiha Akihiro: I am standing facing the young yuki of my clan who is immobile. Well, very quickly my eyes turn to scarlet red displaying 3 tomoe. I draw my kusanagi sword that I imbibe with raikiri chakra then I start a zig zag run towards Yuki at max speed with a mudra in the free hand . I look at her with instance and murder envy. However I am on my guard and my senses active Sharingan senso active Not

Arbitre: Imbibe his weapon with raikiri without first activating it with mudra is invalid. Running at maximum speed in zigzag is logically impossible so the limit will be 5m/s in these conditions. However, following Yuki's abandonment, the victory goes to Akihiro. Victory of Akihiro

combats.id: TOURNOI SNG BIRTHDAY - Stark vs Senju Pendragon
actions: Arbitre: Abandon of Pendragon. Victory of Stark

combats.id: TOURNOI SNG BIRTHDAY - Uzumaki Yû vs Otsutsuki Ishikawa
actions: Yû Uzumaki: The combat starts with a firm grip on two kunai, each held in one hand, ready to strike. Adopting a determined posture, I launch into a calculated speed of 2 meters per second. My initial movement is strategic: I shift to the left, tracing an arc around my opponent. This fluid and precise displacement maintains a constant distance while gradually tightening the noose. My piercing eyes never leave my opponent, analyzing every gesture, every micro-expression. The tension is palpable, the silence pierced by the subtle sound of my steps on the ground. This lateral movement is not random: it aims to test the reflexes and reaction of my enemy, while positioning me ideally for an attack or dodge. Each instant is a dance between caution and aggressiveness, the combat being as mental as physical.
Arbitre: Nothing to report Next

Ishikawa Otsutsuki: Ah I have to do without my flute I also launch into a circular run of 5m/s but in the opposite direction... My opposite run allows me to leave my position and also on the trajectory of the kunai I hold a kunai in hand without stopping in my run observing Yû with my byakugan active > A close combat, does that suit you Yû ? ...

Arbitre: In absence of reference of start of actions, Ishikawa's displacement is done after the launch of the opponent's projectiles. This implies that these projectiles will travel barely half the distance between them (25m) before Ishikawa escapes them. Indeed, the lack of precision on the area covered by the kunai advantages Ishikawa who moves away from them. At his initial position and up to 5m span, the area is tinted with kunai that hang on the ground, leaving the young Otsutsuki to approach his opponent. Next

Yû Uzumaki: I stop abruptly, breaking my run with calculated precision. My piercing gaze remains fixed on the opponent, attentively following each of his movements. In a fluid and determined gesture, my right hand seizes the handle of my katana, unsheathing it in a metallic gleam. I then plunge it directly into the ground in front of me, the blade sinking deeply, marking the terrain with an act as symbolic as strategic. This posture, mixing calm and threat, seems to suspend time as I prepare the suite. Without losing a second, my hands join quickly to execute a series of precise mudras. My fingers dance with a mastered ease, each sign marking the invocation of a formidable technique. My gaze remains riveted on the enemy, gauging his intentions and measuring his reactions to this preparation. These instants are crucial, loaded with a palpable tension, each mudra sealing more the fate that is preparing. In a vif and determined gesture, I strike the ground with my right hand. A powerful wave instantly springs from the impact, propagating like an intense vibration that splits the surface of the ground. This energy rushes directly towards the opponent, shaking the earth up to his feet, threatening to destabilize his posture and disrupt his plans. 💔 Ac
Arbitre: How does Yû strike the ground if she never stopped running?
Arbitre: No earthquake but the distance continues to reduce following Yû's stop. Next

Ishikawa Otsutsuki: Run maintained I find myself quickly at 5m from my opponent following his abrupt stop freezing him on the spot against his will who will take a kunai in the throat that I launched at the moment when I used Petrification on him... Just after my actions at 5m I do a recoil of 5m taking the dab pose Petrification On my guard
Arbitre: The petrification takes place and immobilizes Yû at 5m from her opponent. The kunai is launched and the distance advantages the impact. Next

Yû Uzumaki: If we stick to the principles of ninjas and their art of surprise, my opponent will have no opportunity to launch his kunai. Each movement has been anticipated, each action skillfully orchestrated to exploit the slightest instant of hesitation or opening. From the start, my first assault had only one goal: attract my enemy into a vulnerable position and prepare the ground for my true attack. My plan unfolded perfectly. The opponent, forced to move in the face of the pressure of my projectiles and the intensity of my techniques, did not notice the trap awaiting him. By fixing his attention on my gestures, he neglected the subtleties of his environment. My mudra and the impact on the ground were not a simple demonstration of force, but the activation of a formidable technique. The surface under his feet begins to transform imperceptibly, becoming unstable and treacherous. As he tries to react, the ground suddenly collapses under him, metamorphosing into a moving and inhospitable mass. My Doton technique: Quicksand is implacable, sucking the enemy into a natural prison where every effort to free himself only aggravates his situation. Now trapped, he can only face the consequences of his imprudence. 💔💔
Arbitre: Yû petrified still triggers her jutsu already prepared which sucks Ishikawa, which disrupts the launch and misses the target. Next

Arbitre: Mc of Yû Effectively, no quicksand for Yû. However, it would have been valid since she had made her preparation before Ishikawa's approach. It is therefore a bad counter of Yû who, immobilized, gets her throat pierced and therefore will die. Victory of Ishikawa

combats.id: TOURNOI SNG BIRTHDAY - Uchiha Kogoha vs Stark
actions: UCHIHA KOGOHA: In a virgin grassy plain, Uchiha Kogoha stood facing Stark at 25m. Without delay, Kogoha's sharingan appeared and a run was started composing mudras (2m/sec), mudras finished, Kogoha stopped at 11m from the opponent and launches Katon: Supreme Embracement which rushes immediately on the opponent. To you
Arbitre: Nothing to report Next

Stark: ...a grassy plain, in front of this Uchiwa. Not leaving him from sight, at the launch of the combat, here I am exploding my chakra swirling around me simultaneously to this displacement which appears more like a sudden flash to the spectator but for my opponent who seems to have moved at the same time as me, will be hit by a direct left punch in his face at more than 15m/s. At max it took me 1s to reach him and hit him brutally by sending him crashing to the end of the arena without being able to recognize him afterwards in this crater where he rests. #Chakra Mode Raiton + angry punch
Arbitre: Nothing to report Next

KOGOHA UCHIHA: My opponent says attack me but what does he do with my attack? Not having specified avoiding it, I consider that my opponent is caught by the immense fire wave sent in his direction at the start. After this action, Kogoha quickly composes mudras and makes another Kogoha appear. The two Kogoha each hold a kunai in hand on their guard. # Multi cloning To you

Arbitre: Kogoha static in addition takes his opponent's kick which sends him flying about 10m back. He is touched after having traveled barely 6m forward and therefore well before any form of fire wave. The pain will handicap him for about a turn and he will have spat a lot of blood, which impacts his mobility. Some broken ribs. Next

Stark: My opponent has no respite after my punch, he is sent flying and follows the total crushing. My right fist duly clenched and imbued, following a very high speed bond stimulated by my armor, I serve my opponent a blow in his plexus by crushing his plexus practically piercing it and cracking the ground in a significant deflagration. He won't resist this time. #Chakra Mode Raiton #Improved Strength
Arbitre: A punch does not pierce. Next
Arbitre: Impossible to abandon when undergoing a frontal attack. The blow will therefore be taken given Kogoha's action. Following this power, he surely won't survive it. Victory of Stark

combats.id: Combat Singulier - Uchiha Minachi vs Uchiha Inara
actions: Mininiminachi Uchiha: Being a young prodigy of the village who wants to be an exceptional ninja like his father I was walking in all the corners of the village ahh what sensation 😃 My joy breaks when I meet a young uchiha like me 😩 I really don't want a fight but I have to be like dad for that I must surely test my opponents😞 30m separates us I take out a kunai and start a run towards him at 10m I compose mudras and charge chakra in my feet👣 To you🤬

Inara: Walking in our pretty village 😉 seeing a young of our clan take out a kunai resembling that of the 4th Hokage😎 I say to myself Maybe he wants to show me something he found I advance then towards him with a smile 😀 Suddenly I see him compose mudra I say to myself then he wants to test me, but he must be very prodigious to master a technique at his young age unless it's a feint🧐 I take out then my katana and perform a very careful run towards him (to be safe from surprise when he uses his technique)
Minachi Uchiha: This one really doesn't look idiot🤔🤔 20m traveled I do my technique katon supreme fireball. My katon heads towards you behind I pose an ac To you

Inara: At 10m launch a technique what idiot 😜 he doesn't look like a real Uchiwa A lateral jump ↗ which will allow me to see what you are plotting behind. I take out then my fuma and of course on my guard

Arbitre: Jump invalid Inara does not have enough physical aptitude nor speed and even less agility to jump in front of a fireball that advances straight on him less than 10m Verdict: Inara takes the fireball. He is burned and loses consciousness but not dead. Let's remember that in a fight, the last survivor wins
FIN du Combat Singulier: Uchiha Minachi❌ vs Uchiha Inara✅ Rewards: Uchiha Inara wins 10 PCN + 2 M$ + 5 unit equipments

combats.id: Combat Singulier - Uchiha Tagar vs Senju Shinra
actions: Uchiha Tagar: By this beautiful weather, I just left the ninja shop. I put all my savings to have an arsenal to start my missions. But even more, I fell on this beautiful scythe, sharp and guided at short range via its linked chain, a pure wonder! Suddenly, I could feel a noise behind me. I turn around and in front of me, Shinra. He came to challenge me. Yum yum, I'll test my new weapon. That's when I rush at full speed towards him, my weapon in my right hand, smile on lips

Senju Shinra: 😐 after having lost my ponion at the shop.. I was going this time for another purchase on the way I advance calmly.. In front of this uchiha of my generation but who is it it must surely be the other of my class... The guy turns around and there our gazes were crossed and here he is in my direction I take out my kunai on the right hand and I rush on him vividly... Since I have a long sleeve the guy couldn't see my raijin kote on the left... This smile doesn't foresee anything good

Uchiha Tagar: 15m quickly traveled against 10m for him... Hum, I did well to boost my speed, I say to myself... That's when I accelerate towards Shinra and I jump above him to fall right on him ready to slice him with my brand new blade. A jump of about 3m high...

Senju Shinra: 🕴🏼... You jump to put yourself in danger yourself my little I position my kote towards you and a katon discharge is seen towards you just a little to see your reaction since you jumped then... I concentrate chakra in foot by doing a mudra ✨ Enough to burn ✨🕴🏼
Verdict: This technique of Shinra Senju is not valid I consider as a wtf so pavé canceled Tagar in free fall above Shinra can attack The fight continues🗣
Uchiha Tagar: Above Shinra, with a sword stroke piercing Shinra, I try to decapitate him...
FIN du Combat Singulier: Uchiha Tagar✅ vs Senju Shinra❌ Rewards: Uchiha Tagar wins 10 PCN + 2 M$ + 5 unit equipments

Arbitre: The moving sand does not engulf in one second It will start to sink little by little Not at once Next
♨️ COMBAT SNG - 1vs1vs1 ♨️. ‼️ FIN DU COMBAT ! ‼️

Stark: > Pawaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaar !!! The whole plain resonated with this deafening and imposing voice that was expressed. My forearms adorned with golden armbands sublimated my perfectly drawn muscles. My outfit let see my arms and lightly my torso which drew giant scratches scars almost aesthetically cauterized. Standing fist clenched, I start a zigzag run shifting the rhythm towards my opponent covered with a Chakra veil possessing an elemental nature transformation: the Raiton. It stimulates my body as well as my nervous systems granting me speed and agility. 15m/s this boosted and slightly imperceptible run which propels me at 1m on the left flank of my opponent with my fist in full jaw. With this well dosed blow he is propelled and smashed far away. #Raiton Armor

Hadès Yami: A new duel is announced, this time against the Raikage. Hadès, from his 1m99, wore a hooded cape, his face barely visible under a stormy sky. From the start of the duel, my pupils transformed into Oganingan, reaching their peak. A rain started to fall on the arena as the opponent approached fifteen meters from me from the first second. In his run, he noticed that his Raiton armor had deactivated at the very moment he seemed to want to punch me. With a quick displacement of ten meters to my right, I easily avoided the Raikage's punch, made dodgeable by my reactivity and the decrease in his speed due to the disappearance of his Raiton armor. At my new position, my opponent saw me crouch to pick up some herbs from the plain. My opponent could see me store the herbs in my ninja pouch when after a seizure of three mudras A mist began to spread little by little in the arena, making my silhouette indistinct for my opponent for a moment... a hidden act was then accomplished. Suiton - Sharp Verse Instantaneous Displacement Act in progress... <This message was modified>

Ôotsutsuki: A academic duel I must be the best so I don't intend to spare myself. A movement of the eyelashes now leaves me master of space via my exceptional vision, from there I observe my opponent all without moving a hair. My whitish tunic starts to dance to the rhythm of the wind which embellishes the celestial being that I am.
Arbitre: Nothing to report Next

Yû uchiwa: Yû uchiwa the young girl from konoha is facing an Otsutsuki where she should prove herself to finish with the opponent Positioned at a distance of 25m from the opponent, the start of the combat converges with the unsheathing of four KUNAI in my hands where two in each hand then in parallel the KUNAI are launched one after the other at maximum speed aiming at his head, heart, left leg, right leg As soon as the KUNAI launched I unsheathe a left arc run towards the opponent at 3m/s, but two hands in Mudra #Ac in progress...
Arbitre: Nothing to report Next

Ôotsutsuki: Given the distance and the level of the launcher it remains something palm for me. It is thus that a movement in all ease given the day towards the right while dodging the offensive of the tools. the reception of the movement now leaves two Samoshiki on the arena both distanced less than 2m all observing the opponent coming to them.

Arbitre: What movement is performed? Mc of Samoshiki The absence of displacement in his counter is an error, the absence of distance of offset in his counter is also an error. The absence also of the type of movement performed is an error especially since in a first time he says not to perform bond and in another he says to have done a bond. This contradiction has for consequence the cancellation of his movement. He will therefore take the projectiles and die from them. Victory of Yû

missions.description: Well, it's the mess, you are assailed, 5 tailed demons a 20-tailed Hydre, an 11-tailed Dragon, and 3 cerberus face you.. These animals are of incomparable dexterity... You just need to survive for 6 turns and it's won Be ready for anything you are aligned horizontally from left to right... The demons are at 30m from you, they also aligned. Starting from the Hydre to the Last Cerberus... Useless to want to put them in any illusion, that is simply useless... They have no eyes but their other senses are hyper developed Good Luck !
missions.participants: Lux, Yu, Inara, Alpha, Momoruto, Ganko, Yusuke, Ishikawa, Aoi
missions.recompenses: Lux: 20Pcn + S rank technique if 1st of rank or every 3rd, etc.
actions_moderees: Modo: All as many as you are, have managed to survive, and that was the real objective Bravo End

missions.description: An incomprehensible event that made flee the ninja cats of each clan Uchiha who went to take refuge in a forest. The Hokage of Konoha asks for help from his counterparts in other villages to send their respective ninja aspirants to search for the 🐈. They therefore decided on a D rank mission to develop the abilities of their aspirants while motivating them with non-negligible rewards. ⛔ The ninja cats are quite fast and very agile. They are also capable of scratching you seriously. ⛔ The ninja cats climb trees but not you, you don't know how to climb trees (lack of agility skill). ⛔ Each aspirant will have the right to capture a unique ninja cat. ⛔ All participants are together at the beginning. ⛔ You can only jump 3m max OBJECTIVE: Catch a living cat without injuring it🤕 Mission location: Unknown forest Restrictions: You have 5 pavés max to capture a 🐱
missions.recompenses: Chakra control to walk on water, trees and roofs: 20 PCN (agility + endurance) Increase jump (5m): 5 PCN agility 20 M$ 10 PCN
actions_moderees: Shurikenaté senju: It is under a sunny day that the master hokagé finally decided to put us on the way for us aspiring ninja by offering us a mission question of show our talent 🙂 Me Shurikenaté I will honor my clan and my father by quickly becoming ninja and then I will become hokagé🌀 On that I started a run towards the forest where the fleeing cats are located arrived there in full forest I saw a troop of 3 cats interesting 🙂 40m separating us A boosted run started while picking up a rather big stone that I discreetly hide in my hand so that they don't see I run towards them fixing them....

Radama Uchiha: Already the missions have started for a while today was a special day the worthy son of Madara Uchiha Was going to make his entrance and write his history Direction the forest where my mission was waiting direction my main gate which led to the forest all joyful it was necessary a plan and to be very strategist after some meters course from the house to the gate here I am in the forest that's how I fall on several cats(10) in the same corner including the biggest with black fur it was my target I hide in a bush history to observe them keeping my distance 30m between them and me I reflect calmly without making noise🤔...

Inara: After receiving the mission order from our dear Hokage and having understood that other Aspirants will come from other villages I hurry into the indicated forest. I then see a ninja cat on the tree being already of amusing nature, I think then make him the chat but he is very intelligent and foils my plan that's when a run starts between us. What speed this cat how am I going to catch him but I didn't give up for all that still hoping that he will be tired and that he will try to rest I followed him discreetly, and took care to trap my position with my trap wire. With an idea in mind I will make a detour to chase him from the other side finally to attract him into my trap And suddenly I hear strange noises I say to myself then that it was the other aspi...

battle_royale.participants: Yusuke vs Karuto vs Toshirama vs Kogoha vs Tiger-rama
battle_royale.lieu: Zone délimitée par champ de force
actions: Yusuke: In a total black I find myself with several fighters of whom I know almost nothing in my corner I start to compose Mudras .... Sword drawn and planted in front of me at one meter distance I am in crouched position anyway we don't see each other ..... To you
Toshirama: I find myself in a kind of black hole with several people what to do I put to compose summoning mudra To you
Karuto: What tournament is this again fighting in the dark... AC posed I don't move mudras To you

Tiger-rama: # Senju tiger-rama # # the great one # A battle royale to break the time and bime I find myself with 5 broken arms in a perimeter surrounded by weird stuff behind each of us. Distanced by 15m each I already had a major advantage my senso speed, to start my senso chakra kneads suddenly the whole area becomes mined, I feel everything in this battlefield. With a shuriken glued with a parchment thrown towards j3 after having felt it, a light run towards j4 after advancing 3m in front of my position, my run was a line ready to be curved when another shuriken flies towards j1. With my kneaded chakra I know what happens without seeing my 7th sense becomes higher than others, 8m away from the green zone so without danger, I concentrate my run, 8m/s it was fast! Hakam raiden
Yusuke: My Mudras performed from my crouched position I do an ac .... To you
Karuto: Still this darkness I decide to stay still ... Ac not revealed Well
Toshirama: I do a very big jump to avoid in case with my wolf I place myself in the center and I look at the other fighters To you

Tiger-rama: # Senju tiger-rama # # the great # At kogoha's position I break his neck with my hands in a dry way without him having time to move for something else, I note arbiter that j3 takes the explosive shuriken... Toshirama without defense dies from explosion without seeing dry, kogoha the neck broken like a piece of KFC, now only karuto and yusuke... Without seeing anything, a giant toad falls on yusuke's head which breaks his bones in this flo the little karuto sees himself pushed back into the chakra pump perimeter, the toad descends with a significant mass lifts this young from there.... On my side after having done dirty, I light a cigarette when I advance lightly towards the center of the terrain, with a weed joint... Still feeling all my heightened reflexes! Hakam raiden

Yusuke: After having executed this action I feel something hit me directly in the face immediately I use my hands to remove it and I feel something pass quickly towards my arm briefly I am in crouched position from where my legs are well shaped after that ... I recover my katana which is just in front of me at 1 m , then start a run towards player 4 burning the 6 m then sheathe my katana and do another ac Then I put myself flat stomach immediately after that .... To you

Karuto: Being in place , and sand that starts to suck me I concentrate enough my chakra in my feet not to be engulfed what then I do an instantaneous displacement of 5m forward mudras futon the pierced on 5m wide and 10m long

Tiger-rama: #Senju tiger-rama # # the great # The summoned toad is gamakishi giant, then yusuke crushed the toad makes a movement of his tantot after my instructions, being 10m thick he makes a 7m movement in front of him to shave karuto stuck on the ground, tear him dry ! Kogoha and karuto listening to my cries, karuto knows what to expect but can't do anything, in front of me kogoha who looks for the exit from the center, being also towards the center so he must not be far, I detect him this time by his back I break his neck softly, having finished all opponent to kill, gamakishi disappears and there, I rake all these dead of their goods to go sell, end ! Yusuke dead Toshi + Kogoha + Karuto + Am the only one who remains alive Hakam raiden
Karuto: My legs retained by these sands immediately I launch a blinding bomb in the center of the terrain after having closed my eyes lying on the ground I quickly compose mudras ... To you
